activities_projects.title: Observing Day and Night
activities_projects.objective: Understand rotation of Earth causing day and night
steps: Darken room and place globe on table
Shine torch on one side of globe to represent the Sun
Rotate globe slowly and observe day and night cycle
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that Earth’s rotation causes day and night
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct demonstration of day-night cycle (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Modeling Phases of the Moon
activities_projects.objective: Understand changing appearance of the Moon
steps: Place globe in center, hold Moon ball near it
Shine torch on Moon from different angles
Observe illuminated portion to simulate moon phases
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands waxing, waning, full and new Moon
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct demonstration of Moon phases (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Exploring Solar Eclipse Using Models
activities_projects.objective: Understand alignment during a solar eclipse
steps: Darken room and place globe
Hold Moon between torch and globe
Observe shadow cast on Earth to simulate solar eclipse
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns position of Sun, Moon, and Earth during solar eclipse

activities_projects.title: Exploring Lunar Eclipse Using Models
activities_projects.objective: Understand alignment during a lunar eclipse
steps: Place Moon on opposite side of Earth from Sun
Observe Earth's shadow falling on Moon
Explain lunar eclipse formation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that lunar eclipse occurs when Earth blocks sunlight from reaching Moon

activities_projects.title: Observing Shadows at Different Times
activities_projects.objective: Understand Sun’s apparent movement across sky
steps: Place stick vertically on ground
Mark tip of shadow in morning, noon, evening
Observe change in length and direction of shadow
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects Sun’s position with shadow length and direction

activities_projects.title: Observing Phases Using Images
steps: Identify new, crescent, quarter, gibbous, and full Moon
Sequence them correctly
Explain why Moon appears differently
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands visual changes of Moon across month

activities_projects.title: Rotation vs Revolution of Earth
steps: Rotate globe on its axis (rotation)
Move globe around torch (Sun) to simulate revolution
Observe day-night vs year cycle
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands rotation causes day-night; revolution causes year and seasons

activities_projects.title: Observing Moon Rise and Set
activities_projects.objective: Relate Moon movement to Earth rotation
steps: Record time of Moon rise and set for several days
Note pattern in Moon movement
Explain observations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns Moon’s apparent movement in sky

activities_projects.title: Exploring Sun’s Position in Sky
steps: Observe Sun’s position in morning, noon, evening
Record height and direction in sky
Discuss implications on shadow and temperature
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands Sun’s apparent movement across sky

activities_projects.title: Quiz on Earth, Moon, and Sun
steps: Prepare five questions on Moon phases and eclipses
Prepare five questions on Earth’s rotation and revolution
Exchange with a friend and solve
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and answers (10 marks)
